rule.note: V2rayU currently maps freedom to sing-box direct outbound.

app_support.note: Current generator directly outputs direct.

rule.note: V2rayU currently maps blackhole to sing-box block outbound.

app_support.note: Current generator directly outputs block.

rule.note: Current fallback rules handle SOCKS outbound as regular sing-box SOCKS outbound.

app_support.note: Current generator has implemented SOCKS outbound.

rule.note: Current fallback rules handle Shadowsocks outbound as regular sing-box Shadowsocks outbound.

app_support.note: Current generator has implemented Shadowsocks outbound.

rule.note: Current fallback rules handle VMess outbound as regular sing-box VMess outbound.

app_support.note: Current generator has implemented VMess outbound.

rule.note: Current fallback rules handle VLESS outbound as regular sing-box VLESS outbound.

app_support.note: Current generator has implemented VLESS outbound.

rule.note: Current fallback rules handle Trojan outbound as regular sing-box Trojan outbound.

app_support.note: Current generator has implemented Trojan outbound.

rule.note: Current fallback rules handle AnyTLS outbound as regular sing-box AnyTLS outbound.

app_support.note: Current generator has implemented AnyTLS outbound.

rule.note: Naive outbound requires sing-box >= 1.13.0.

app_support.note: Current generator has implemented naive outbound.

rule.note: SSH outbound requires sing-box >= 1.11.0.

app_support.note: Current generator has implemented SSH outbound.

rule.note: Sing-Box natively supports hysteria2 outbound.

app_support.note: Current generator has implemented hysteria2 outbound.

rule.note: Only used for auto-fallback checks, Xray HTTP outbound is not directly treated as lossless fallback.

app_support.note: Current Sing-Box fallback generator does not generate equivalent configurations for Xray HTTP outbound.

rule.note: Only used for auto-fallback checks, Xray DNS outbound is not directly treated as lossless fallback.

app_support.note: Current Sing-Box fallback generator does not generate equivalent configurations for Xray DNS outbound.

rule.note: V2rayU currently does not generate extra sing-box transport block for plain TCP transport.

app_support.note: Plain TCP transport works directly.

rule.note: Current fallback rules handle WebSocket transport as regular sing-box WebSocket transport.

app_support.note: Current generator has implemented WebSocket transport.

rule.note: Current fallback rules handle h2 model as sing-box HTTP transport.

app_support.note: Current generator maps h2 model to sing-box http transport.

rule.note: Current fallback rules handle gRPC transport as regular sing-box gRPC transport.

app_support.note: Current generator has implemented gRPC transport.

rule.note: Sing-Box does not support KCP transport protocol.
Current fallback rules handle QUIC transport as regular sing-box QUIC transport.

app_support.note: Current generator has implemented QUIC transport.

rule.note: Current fallback rules handle unix/domain socket transport as sing-box unix/domain socket transport.

app_support.note: Current generator has implemented domain socket transport.

rule.note: xhttp core support and bounds must be checked independently; it is not treated as a safe auto-fallback target by default.

app_support.note: Although the generator writes type=xhttp, there is no version assurance or full field mapping validation yet.

rule.note: Hysteria2 uses custom QUIC transport, natively supported by Sing-Box.

app_support.note: Hysteria2 uses custom QUIC transport, natively supported by current generator.

rule.note: Default scenario when no TLS/REALITY is configured.

app_support.note: Current generator can directly output.

rule.note: Current fallback rules handle TLS as regular sing-box TLS.

app_support.note: Current generator has implemented TLS configurations.

rule.note: Current fallback rules handle REALITY as regular sing-box REALITY.

app_support.note: Current generator has implemented REALITY configurations.

rule.note: XTLS cannot be inferred as lossless fallback to sing-box solely by transport security name.

app_support.note: Current fallback generator does not implement equivalent sing-box configuration translation for XTLS.

rule.note: vision flow needs to be checked in combination with security/transport options.

app_support.note: The auto-fallback chain has not validated vision flow usability to allow default takeover yet.

rule.note: vision flow needs to be checked in combination with security/transport options.

app_support.note: The auto-fallback chain has not validated vision flow usability to allow default takeover yet.

rule.note: Xray TCP + HTTP disguise cannot be directly translated to auto-fallback on sing-box.

app_support.note: Current fallback generator does not implement equivalent configuration translation for TCP + HTTP disguise.
